# Gambling Chip

## Description

At the start of each combat, discard any number of cards then draw that many.

## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.
     Wiki facts live above the divider. -->
- Strong boss/elite consistency relic; mulligan away curses, basics, and off-plan cards to find setup powers, block, or the exact opening damage plan.
- With Petrified Toad and full potion slots, remember Potion-Shaped Rock may not be procured; potion-slot planning matters before combat starts.
